log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
--- Elf — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ROUND 2 ===

ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Elf — Unarmored Caster.
→ Elf — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 18 necrotic damage (half).

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:13+9=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.

--- Elf — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:6+9=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
